Entity_Description: Swift Current is a city in Southwest Saskatchewan, Saskatchewan, Canada, with a 2021 census population of 16,750, up from 16,604 in 2016. It was incorporated in 1914 and founded in 1883 with the arrival of the CPR. Its economy runs on oil and gas, agriculture, wind energy and healthcare (Cypress Regional Hospital). Landmarks include the Chinook Pathway along Swift Current Creek, the Windscape Kite Festival and the Swift Current Museum, and it sits 220 km from Saskatoon.
